;LOAD ingatellentSettings.qmd
;LOAD ingatellentHelpers.qmd
SLOT ingatellentConfigProperties
INSERT {
property ~&6503679477&~ ingatellentTransparentSleep: ~&6504329801&~
}
END SLOT

AFFECT [[2328484894988065446]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[7713531976371484]]
REBUILD [[233748328658231]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
INSERT { ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.ingatellentTransparentSleep || }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT [[15121912574361901350]]
IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]]
TRAVERSE ?#[[6504254477]]
LOCATE AFTER ALL
INSERT {
    ~&9195823055201242195&~: ~&7712198086779994&~.~&11705357959816995461&~
    ~&8399254548634699250&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&214599571833&~{
    ~&5972374&~: ingatellentTransparentSleepPanel
    ~&214632764553&~: "Transparent sleepscreen"
    ~&478136262235079021&~: "Respect transparency for sleep screen."
    ~&7082453764199&~: ~&425121728314878811&~.~&7081958765675&~ {
        ~&5972374&~: ingatellentTransparentSleepToggle
        ~&233723734822480&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.ingatellentTransparentSleep
        ~&254542236275632405&~: ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.ingatellentTransparentSleep = !~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.ingatellentTransparentSleep
        }
    }
}
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qt/qml/xofm/modules/sleepscreen/qml/default/sleep-window-opaque.qml
IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]]
TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]]#[[6504254477]] > [[14427530104363229979]]:[[477062473974076915]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REBUILD [[214622605608]] LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.ingatellentTransparentSleep ? ~&"503220030291830651&~ : }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT

AFFECT /qt/qml/xofm/modules/sleepscreen/qml/tatsu/sleep-window-opaque.qml
IMPORT [[7082546018834]] [[180922.180921]]
TRAVERSE [[7711468349764991]]#[[6504254477]] > [[14427530104363229979]]:[[477062473974076915]]
LOCATE BEFORE ALL
REBUILD [[214622605608]] LOCATE BEFORE ALL INSERT { ~&7082020628281&~.ingatellentSettings.ingatellentTransparentSleep ? ~&"503220030291830651&~ : }
END REBUILD
END TRAVERSE
END AFFECT
